title: Phrases: connect words into sentences
description: Move from isolated words to full phrases — your first real sentences
text: the dog and the cat had a sad day they tried hard to win at last and were happy
tips: Read the sentence first, then type — better than reading character by character
Spaces are part of rhythm — don't pause before them
Aim for steady pace, not bursts

character_tips.anna: Now you're typing real sentences. Notice how rhythm carries you through.
character_tips.maxim: Read ahead by 2-3 words. Your fingers will follow.
character_tips.knopych: Phrases unlock! Words connect! Combos forever! 🎮
character_tips.klavochka: Real sentences, sweetheart! You're a real writer now! ✨
